commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent `message_end` handling to unwrap standalone `message(action=send)` JSON envelopes and adds a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +40. Total +68 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main sends `rawVisibleText` through the final `message_end` reply path without unwrapping standalone `message` tool JSON. I did not run a live provider/channel repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor real behavior proof or maintainer proof override; there is no narrow code repair to queue from this review.

target.title: fix(agents): unwrap standalone message tool JSON
target.body:
## Summary

- Unwrap standalone downgraded `message` tool JSON during final assistant `message_end` delivery.
- Preserve the existing diagnostic warning path and add a focused regression for the `openai-completions`-style leaked envelope.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Standalone assistant text shaped like `{"name":"message","arguments":{"action":"send","message":"..."}}` no longer posts that JSON envelope during message_end delivery; OpenClaw delivers the `message` argument text instead.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw test checkout in the dedicated worktree.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
Evidence after fix: The new `handleMessageEnd` regression delivered the extracted message text through `emitBlockReply` and the focused Vitest file passed.
Observed result after fix: 29 tests passed, including the regression for the `openai-completions`-style message-tool JSON envelope.
What was not tested: Live Discord/openai-completions end-to-end delivery; streamed `text_delta` or chunked delivery variants are intentionally outside this small patch.
target.author: monkeyleet
